overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) for men and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) for women, along with medically supervised weight loss therapy, all supervised by board-certified professionals.
highlights: Customized TRT based on individual hormone levels
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapy
targetAudience: Men experiencing low testosterone and women managing menopause or hormone imbalance symptoms.
